🎯 Interview Edge.title: Deontic Policies for Runtime Governance of Agentic AI Systems
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Autonomous agentic AI systems driven by Large Language Models (LLMs) introduce a new class of security, privacy, and compliance challenges.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Hidden Anchors in Multi-Agent LLM Deliberation
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Multi-agent LLM deliberation mirrors how humans reach decisions, yet how and why it works is rarely modelled.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: DeXposure-Claw: An Agentic System for DeFi Risk Supervision
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: DeXposure-Claw is a forecast-grounded agentic supervision system for decentralized finance, addressing the challenges of fast-moving, networked credit risks.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Uncertainty Decomposition for Clarification Seeking in LLM Agents
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Recent position papers argue that the classical aleatoric/epistemic uncertainty framework is insufficient for interactive large language model (LLM) agents.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: From PGP to Mythos: a brief history of export controls that didn’t stop anyone
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: For the last 30 years, stopping the flow of cybersecurity-related software has proven to be ineffective.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Is the US government’s Anthropic ban accidentally helping the brand?
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have signed an open letter calling the US government's ban on Anthropic's models 'dangerous'.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Diffusion Language Models: An Experimental Analysis
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) generate text through iterative denoising rather than next-token prediction, allowing parallel refinement of text.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: ITNet: A Learnable Integral Transform That Subsumes Convolution, Attention, and Recurrence
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: ITNet is a learnable integral transform that subsumes convolution, attention, and recurrence, showing that these different inductive biases are not fundamental.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: Emergent Alignment
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: Emergent Alignment is a method that endows an LLM with a conscience step that reviews its own reasoning and outputs, and extends the training loss with an alignment component.

hot_take: The recent developments in agentic AI and large language models highlight the need for more research in runtime governance, uncertainty decomposition, and emergent alignment to ensure responsible AI development.
